summary: Phase A/B/D/E features testing COMPLETED. 13/13 backend API tests passed. All frontend features verified via UI testing. Key features: (1) Admin Members Manager has SELECT dropdowns for Sponsor/Mentor/Member Type, (2) Membership Profile page with 3 tabs and Biography modal, (3) Portfolio Form with cascading Sector->Industry->Symbol selects and Shared Members All/Select, (4) My Community search implemented with clickable results list.
passed_tests: 1. POST /api/auth/login with admin@consultant.com / Admin123! returns token and user data
2. GET /api/member/sectors returns 6 sectors (Technology, Healthcare, Financial Services, Energy, Consumer Discretionary, Communication Services)
3. GET /api/member/industries?sector_id=sect_tech returns tech industries (Software, Hardware, Semiconductors)
5. GET /api/member/members-list requires auth and returns member list for sharing
6. Admin login -> navigate to /admin/members -> table shows Member Type column (not Username)
7. Admin Members Manager: Sponsor field is a SELECT dropdown (not number input)
8. Admin Members Manager: Mentor field is a SELECT dropdown showing only mentors (AUX-1 Carlos Artiles)
9. Admin Members Manager: Member Type is a SELECT with options [Member, Admin]
10. Admin Members Manager: has Mentor YES/NO and Portfolio Development YES/NO radio buttons
12. Membership Profile page has 3 tabs: General Info, Social Links, Activities
13. Membership Profile has Update Biography button that opens a modal with Cover Image, Summary, Biography fields
14. Sidebar has: Membership Profile, Mentorship Profile, My Sponsor, Invite Code, My Community, Portfolios (NO 'Update Biography')
15. Portfolio Form page: holdings use cascading Sector->Industry->Symbol selects
16. Portfolio Form: has Shared Members section with All/Select radio buttons
18. My Community page: search input present with filter options (Membership Number, First Name, Last Name)
19. Portfolio CRUD with shared_mode (all/select) and status (active/inactive) working

test_credentials.note: Admin is in 'members' collection with role='admin', membership_id='ADMIN'

seed_data_creation: Sectors/Industries/Companies seeded in MongoDB (6 sectors, 13 industries, 15 companies)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase A/B/D/E features fully tested. Key implementations: (1) MembersManager.js uses SELECT for Sponsor (all members), Mentor (only is_mentor=true members), Member Type (Admin/Member), (2) MembershipProfile.js has 3 tabs and Update Biography button opens modal, (3) PortfolioForm.js has cascading selects (Sector->Industry->Symbol) and Shared Members (All/Select radio), (4) MyCommunity.js has search with clickable results showing CODE + Full Name. Note: My Community search only shows members in user's sponsored tree - admin has no sponsored members so search returns empty. The Mentor SELECT in MembersManager only shows members with is_mentor=true (currently only AUX-1 Carlos Artiles).

phase_a_fixes: Sponsor field is SELECT dropdown in MembersManager
Mentor field is SELECT dropdown showing only mentors
phase_b_membership_profile: 3 tabs: General Info, Social Links, Activities
Biography modal has Cover Image, Summary, Biography fields
phase_d_portfolio: Shared Members section with All/Select radio buttons
phase_e_my_community: Search results displayed as clickable list
Results show CODE (AUX-X) + Full Name format
Clicking result opens member profile modal
